scoringPlays.text: Carnell Tate 9 Yd pass from Julian Sayin (Jayden Fielding Kick)
Elijah Sarratt 17 Yd pass from Fernando Mendoza (Nico Radicic Kick)

videos.headline: Fernando Mendoza: Indiana's success lies in never being complacent
videos.description: Fernando Mendoza gives insight into Indiana's record-breaking season after winning the Big Ten title.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF Presser (Fernando Mendoza: Indiana's success lies in never being complacent ) 2025/12/06
